message.content:
@startuml
title Shared memory receiver behaviour

participant "Shared memory receiver" as SMR
participant "Semaphore coord" as SC
participant "Reader count var" as RCV
participant "locks_active" as LA
participant "locks_leaving" as LL
participant "Semaphore copy" as SCopy
participant "Copy buff" as CB

group create
    alt ["Coordination semaphore doesn't exist"]
        SMR -> SC : Create semaphore
        create participant "Semaphore coord" as SC2
        SMR -> SC2
    end

    SMR -> RCV : wait
    note right of CB : Writer inits it with the required number
    RCV --> SMR : Writer sets up sharedmemory\nWriter is ready
    SMR <.. RCV : ok
    note right of RCV : this way all readers access the memory,\nthey will fail on the copy sem
    SMR -> RCV : reincrease
    SMR -> RCV : MMap coordination struct
    SMR -> SCopy : Trylock copy semaphore

    alt [fail]
        SMR <-- SCopy : Can't lock
        SMR <-- SMR : Fail
    else [success]
        SMR <-- SCopy : Success
        SMR -> SMR : MMap copy buffer
        SMR -> SMR : read_flag to true
        SMR -> LL : Lock leaving[1]
        SMR -> SCopy : Signal reader ready
    end

    SMR -> SC : Close coordination semaphore file
    SMR <-- SMR : Success
end

group ready
    SMR -> SMR : ready?
    alt [finished flag set]
        SMR <-- SMR : False
    else [has read current chunk]
        SMR -> LL : lock next chunk (reading)
        note right of LL : Blocks until next\nchunk is written
        SMR -> LL : Release previous leaving
        SMR -> SMR : Change active
        SMR -> SMR : reset read flag
        SMR -> RCV : get chunk size
        SMR <.. RCV : c_size
        SMR <-- SMR : c_size > 0
    else [Yet to read current and no finished flag]
        SMR <-- SMR : True
    end

    alt [finished]
        note left of SMR : This is done before\nactually returning
        SMR -> SMR : Set finished flag
        SMR -> SMR : Release lock
    end
end

group buff size
    SMR -> SMR : get buff_size from coord
    [<-- SMR : buff_size
end

group receive
    note right of SMR : This is called after ready so I am already on the correct\nchunk and it has data to read
    alt [read_flag_set or finished flag set]
        SMR <-- SMR : Fail
    end

    SMR -> CB : Read data in current chunk
    SMR <.. CB : vector
    SMR -> SMR : set read flag
    SMR -> LL : lock leaving
    SMR -> LA : release active
    [<-- SMR : vector
end

group destructor
    SMR -> SMR : Destroy
    alt [not finished]
        alt [read_flag set]
            SMR -> LL : unlock
        else [read_flag false]
            SMR -> LA : unlock
        end
    end

    SMR -> RCV : Notify left
    SMR -> SMR : Unmap memory
    SMR -> SMR : Close files
end

participant "Shared memory receiver" as SMR2
participant "Semaphore coord" as SC3
participant "Reader count var" as RCV2
participant "locks_active" as LA2
participant "locks_leaving" as LL2
participant "Semaphore copy" as SCopy2
participant "Copy buff" as CB2

@enduml
